text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: There, that's all of today's drills!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's training is going well, and she's getting into the swing
of it. But something is still missing...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text: Really nice results today! You're almost ready for the next race!

text_block_list.name: Cheerful Umamusume
text_block_list.text: For real?! Hehehe, guess I better get ready for my big reward, huh? ♪

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, there it is! Sure thing, lemme just make a reservation for that
premium dessert buffet you've been dreaming about!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seeing other trainers with their racers, I can't help but think...
choice_data_list: (I might need to get to know Taishin better...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the most part, I only see her during training. I know next to
nothing about Taishin herself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? I did all my routines. Am I missing something?
choice_data_list: Is there anywhere you'd like to go?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Not really. I don't have time to keep you company anyway. I'm gonna
cool down and head back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she's gone... Hopefully I'll get to know her better as we train
more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, a letter goes out to all faculty. It turns out to be a bonus
from the academy—tickets to an aquarium.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I would've invited Taishin, but she turned me down last time I tried.
So, I head off by myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a small aquarium in the suburbs, quiet and with only a sprinkling of
visitors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...One of whom I recognize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I debate whether to say something, she mumbles to herself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...What's next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something's different than usual. Perplexed, I watch silently as she
drifts off to another area.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it's a small aquarium, and as I stroll around, I wind up seeing her
again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's standing by the "Fishy-Fun-Time" touch tank, staring down the
doctorfish inside.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Here I go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She cautiously checks if anyone is around, then gathers her courage
and dips a hand in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her worry melts away as the squirming fish tickles her fingers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, as the sun begins to set...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are barely any visitors now. The aquarium is still and noiseless
as the deep sea.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And all alone, joyfully snapping pics of the energetic sea creatures, is
Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For someone who hates groups, she has an awfully big smile looking
at the school of fish.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wha! It's you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I freeze like a deer in headlights. A wave of embarrassment washes
over me as I struggle to reply.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Smooth. If she realizes I was watching her, I don't even want to think how mad she'll be...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's always like this here, you know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She smiles, not a hint of anger to be heard in her voice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's the tranquil blue ambience... but she seems so gentle.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
There's another bigger, fancier aquarium nearby. So pretty much
everyone goes there now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's why it's always quiet here. Most come by themselves. And
they're all fish-lovers, so they just stare at the tanks the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: They don't give a second thought to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She pauses, her words fading into the background music.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For all the time we've spent together, I've never seen her make a face
like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But how about you, fishies? I wonder if they notice me... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whatever, it doesn't matter. They aren't really watching. They're just
around.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's fine... I like it that way—makes it easier for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm? Hey, what's that grin for?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That so? You're kinda weird sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, I gotta go. This place closes pretty early, so watch out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look on as the mysterious aquarium-goer disappears into the
distance.
choice_data_list: (This turned out to be a pretty great day.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hopefully, it's a sign of progress.

text_block_list.name: Cheerful Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Whoo-hoo! A new record! Hey, maybe it's time to make reservations
for the premium dessert buffet, huh?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a minute! Breaking your record's amazing, but the dessert's
your big prize for when you win the race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The banter between trainer and trainee looks fun, but this time... I
feel a little less envious.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yep... Enough chitchat though. Let's keep it moving.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Umm, is it me, or are you crazy happy today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've come to realize that I'm happy the way things are.
